## Quick Summary

> One sentence: What does this PR do?

## Type of Change

- [ ] 🐛 Bug fix
- [ ] ✨ New feature
- [ ] 📝 Documentation update
- [ ] ♻️ Refactor (no functional changes)
- [ ] 🎨 UI/UX improvement
- [ ] ⚡ Performance improvement

## What Changed

**Before:**
(What was the old behavior?)

**After:**
(What's the new behavior?)

**Why:**
(What problem does this solve?)

## Testing

**How to test:**

1. Do this...
2. Then this...
3. Should see...

**Tested on:**

- [ ] Desktop (Windows/Mac/Linux)
- [ ] Mobile (iOS/Android)
- [ ] Multiple screen sizes

## Screenshots

(If UI changes, show before/after)

## Checklist

**Before requesting review:**

- [ ] Code follows project style
- [ ] Comments added for complex logic
- [ ] Documentation updated (if needed)
- [ ] No console errors/warnings
- [ ] Tested on my own device
- [ ] ADHD-friendly UI patterns followed

## Additional Context

**Related issues:** Closes #\_\_\_

**Breaking changes:** (if any)

**Migration needed:** (if any)

> 💡 **Tip:** Smaller PRs get reviewed faster!
> 🎯 **Focus:** Remember Altair's mission - productivity for ADHD users
